card_page.policy_text:
Programs & Classes
Research & Learning
1 The Old Colony Library Network (OCLN) has migrated to a new computer system.
$('#breadCrumbs').hide();
Library SpotlightsWhat's New at the Library
HPL Movie: "The Farewell" In this funny, uplifting tale a Chinese family discovers their grandmother has only a short while left to live and decide to keep her in the dark, scheduling a wedding to gather before she dies. Showing twice: May 20 at 7:00 and May 21 at 1:00. Learn more...
Gentle Flow and Stretch Yoga Join us on Thursday, May 21 at 6:30 for a beginner hatha yoga class. Learn more...
High Tide, Low Tide: Me, My Stuff, and I Join us on Saturday, May 30 at 10:00 for a lively discussion with Lee Shuer, a hoarding disorder expert with lived experience, who understands the challenges of reducing clutter and offers practical, supportive approaches to help. Learn more...
Kids Book Groups Join us for one of our children's book groups in May! We have a 2nd & 3rd grade group and a 4th & 5th grade group. We look forward to reading with you! Learn more...
Library CalendarWhat's Happening at the Library
Wed, May 20 OLLI Talk
Book Group for 4th & 5th Grade: "Big Nate in the Zone" by Lincoln Peirce
Lotus Flower Lantern Craft Workshop and Documentary Screening
HPL Movie: "The Farewell"
Thu, May 21 Music & Movement with Ms. Rebecca | ages 4 and under
HPL Movies in the Afternoon: "The Farewell"
Gentle Flow and Stretch Yoga
Sat, May 23 Folk Art Friends
Read-to-a-Dog | Ages 5+
Sensory Play (ages 5 and under)
Hingham Public Library66 Leavitt StreetHingham, MA 02043
Phone: 781-741-1405Email: library@hingham.ocln.orgContact Us
Monday - Thursday: 10 a.m. - 9 p.m.
Saturday: 9 a.m. - 5 p.m.
Sunday: 1 p.m. - 5 p.m.

pass_page.policy_text:
Choose Museum | Hingham Public Library document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function(){ var tooltipTriggerList = [].slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('[data-bs-toggle="tooltip"]')); var tooltipList = tooltipTriggerList.map(function(element){ return new bootstrap.Tooltip(element); }); }); My Account
Which museum would you like to visit? Boston By Foot
87 Mt Vernon Street Boston, MA 02108 617-367-2345
Visit museum website for more information.
This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration.
Offers free admission for your group on most Boston by Foot walking tours (does not include: Footloose on the Freedom Trail, Beacon with a Boo, any water-based tours, or any private tours).
Boston Children's Museum
308 Congress Street Boston, MA 02210 617-426-6500
This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. 
The admission fee is half price per person for up to four people.
This pass has been provided by a generous contribution from the Hingham Newcomers Club.
Boston Harbor Island Ferry
66 Long Wharf Boston, MA 02110 617-227-4321
This is a two for one pass to the Boston Harbor Islands and is good for up to four people. It is not good for Sunset Cruises.
Reservations Recommended by calling Boston Harbor Cruises at 617-227-4321. Specify which island you plan to visit, your date of travel, and your departure and return times based on the ferry schedule.
On the day of your trip, go to the Boston Harbor Cruises Ferry Center at Long Wharf in Boston or at Pemberton Point in Hull, MA. Pick up your tickets at the Will-Call window at least 15 minutes prior to your scheduled ferry departure.
Present the Boston Harbor Islands Library Pass to receive your free ticket with purchase of one Harbor Islands ferry ticket.
Harvard Museum of Natural History
26 Oxford Street Cambridge, MA 02138 617-495-3045
This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Reference Desk. Please remember we are closed on Fridays and Summer Sundays, so be sure to pick up your passes in advance.
$6.00 Admission fee per person for up to four people. This pass also includes admission to the Peabody Museum of Archaeology and Ethnology. The two museums connect on the third floor and visitors may move freely from one to the other - all for one admission price.
Heritage Museums & Gardens
67 Grove Street Sandwich, MA 02563 508-888-3300
Pass allows 50% off regular general admission to museum & gardens for up to 6 adults or youths (3-17 years old). Children 2 and under are admitted free.
Institute of Contemporary Art Boston
25 Harbor Shore Drive Boston, MA 02210 617-478-3100
Each pass allows up to two people a discounted rate of $10.00 each. The ICA is always free to children 17 and under.  The ICA is free to the public on Thursday nights from 5:00-9:00pm.
Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
25 Evans Way Boston, MA 02115 617-566-1401
Each pass provides up to 4 people with $5.00 admission per person, redeemable at the admission desk. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted free.
